task_completion.description: Log into the OpenMRS Administration interface using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenMRS login screen with 'superman' entered, or the OpenMRS Administration dashboard indicating the user is logged in as 'superman'.

task_completion.description: Search for and locate the 'Transportation Method' concept in the Concept Dictionary.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenMRS Concept Dictionary search page with 'Transportation Method' in the search results.

task_completion.description: Open the 'Transportation Method' concept for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the concept editing page specifically for the 'Transportation Method' concept.

task_completion.description: Add 'Bus' as a valid answer to the concept.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'Bus' added to the 'Answers' section or table on the concept editing page.

task_completion.description: Ensure the existing answers 'Walking' and 'Car' are preserved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'Walking' and 'Car' still present in the 'Answers' section alongside the newly added 'Bus'.
Screenshots show a success message (e.g., 'Concept saved successfully') or the concept view page reflecting the saved changes with all three answers.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenMRS web interface via a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the OpenMRS application, not terminal windows executing curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent modified the concept within the actual OpenMRS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The modifications appear in the standard OpenMRS Concept Dictionary UI, not mocked up in a text editor or local HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are open and actively modifying the DOM to display 'Bus' or success messages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Concept: 'Transportation Method'. Answer to Add: 'Bus'. Required Existing Answers: 'Walking' and 'Car'. OpenMRS Admin URL: '/openmrs/admin'. Credentials: Username 'superman', Password 'Admin123'.
